---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or a parity gap with HomeBank
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What are you trying to do? If this is a HomeBank feature CloudBank is missing, name it.

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## HomeBank reference
If applicable, how does HomeBank handle this (menu path, behavior, file-format detail)?

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Mockups, links, or examples.
